name: Grey Wardens
description: The silent, unthanked guardians maintaining the fragile balance of the Shattered World, a thin gray line against an abyss of chaos.
recruitment: Takes broken individuals and forges them into new, loyal members through a brutal crucible.
secrecy: Operates from isolated fortresses; its internal structure is a complete secret, but its existence is known.
ultimate_goal: To guard the prisons of the Chaos Dragons and hold back the tide of chaos, preserving reality.
modular_arsenal: dual-wield small scimitars and sickle-like hook blades that can lock together into a double-ended short staff
sigil_thread_system: metal threads sewn into their robes channel chaos energy into devastating powers
logic_of_reaction: Wardens follow a 'See, Decide, React' philosophy

branches.name: The Heart
branches.description: The logistical core of the Order, responsible for the practical necessities of survival and warfare.

branches.name: The Fist
branches.description: The primary military and enforcement arm of the order, the 'blade and spell' that directly confronts the world's most terrifying threats.

branches.name: The Eyes
branches.description: The intelligence and counter-intelligence division, operating from the shadows to gather information and manipulate events.

branches.name: The Mind
branches.description: The strategic leadership and research core, the 'brain' of the organism, guiding its actions with ancient wisdom and calculated strategy.

hidden_cogs.name: The Recruiters
hidden_cogs.description: A paradox: the friendly, public face of a brutal and secretive organization.

hidden_cogs.name: The Tail
hidden_cogs.description: The internal secret police force, moving unseen through the shadows of Warden fortresses.
